relationships: kab:Ad iliɣ da arma d letnayen i d-iteddun
kab:Ad as-tini d acu ara yexdem
kab:Cukkeɣ yewwi-d ad neddukel d tarbaɛt
kab:Tura ad nẓeṛ d acu ara yeḍṛun
kab:Tom yella iḥemmel ad yexdem d Mary
kab:Akka tura deg Marikan, d ass
kab:Tom d Mary ad xedmen deg iḍ-a﹖
kab:Iban Tom ue yettuɣal ara ad yexdem ayagiseg wass-a d asawen
kab:Ur yeẓri ara Tom dakken Mary d Takanadit
kab:Nnan-as i Tom d akken ur ilaq ara ad iṛuḥ
kab:Marie ur teẓri ara dakken d nettat ay yettwasmemmin
kab:Ula d mary ur tezmir ara ad tṛuḥ ɣer Boston
kab:Ur yezmir ara Tom ad immeslay d Mary
kab:Acuɣer ur d-tesbeddayeḍ ara iman-im d taselwayt﹖
kab:Yetturar ddabex n uḍar d yimeddukal-is
kab:Acuɣer ur d-tesbeddayeḍ ara iman-ik d aselway﹖
kab:Tom ur yettɣimi ara, d acu kan Mary ad teqqim
kab:Marie tella d tamburt s teɣzef n tmeddurt-nnes
kab:Ini-yas i Tom d akken ur zmireɣ ara ad zewǧeɣ yid-s
kab:Acuɣer ur nettraǧu ara armi d ass n letnayen﹖
